title: Name My TARDIS!
description: This server-side mod allows you to name your TARDIS in TDWCM Remake!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71a96bff01606d5be17c1b322c17221870f192c0.jpeg)

<hr>

This is an addon mod for [The Doctor Who Client Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-doctor-who-client-mod) (Remake by DuMonde). This is also a server-side mod which allows you to name your TARDIS in TDWCM Remake, using a nametag like a normal entity to help with seperating TARDISes!

<hr>

“We’re all stories in the end. Just make it a good one.” – The Doctor
